original: A squat little thing, placed on your eye like half of a pair of glasses. It operates as a targeting assist, hooking up with the muzzle of a ranged weapon and giving you some flexibility of being able to aim without glaring down the sight of the weapon.
context: <<POS:05331985>> -assisting eyepiece",e.tooltip='A squat little thing, placed on your eye like half of a pair'
